recommendations.title: Daniel & Ana
recommendations.overview: Being kidnapped shatters a brother and sister's harmony, forcing them to confront their desires.

recommendations.title: Sundown
recommendations.overview: When a distant emergency disrupts a vacation in Acapulco, simmering tensions rise to the fore between scions of a wealthy British family.

recommendations.title: After Lucia
recommendations.overview: Alejandra and her dad Roberto have just moved to town. She is new at school, he has a new job. Starting over is sometimes complicated when you have left so much behind.

recommendations.title: Memory
recommendations.overview: Sylvia is a social worker who leads a simple and structured life: her daughter, her job, her AA meetings. This is blown open when Saul follows her home from their high school reunion. Their surprise encounter will profoundly impact both of them as th

recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.

recommendations.title: Dance of the Forty One
recommendations.overview: Mexico City, November 1901. The police raid a private home where a secret party is being held. Among those attending is the son-in-law of President Porfirio Díaz.

recommendations.title: The Mauritanian
recommendations.overview: The true story of the Mauritanian Mohamedou Ould Slahi, who was held at the U.S military's Guantanamo Bay detention center without charges for over a decade and sought help from a defense attorney for his release.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: The Runaway Bride
recommendations.overview: A young bride in the midst of her wedding finds herself mysteriously transported to the TARDIS. The Doctor must discover what her connection is with the Empress of the Racnoss's plan to destroy the world.

recommendations.title: Stand by Me Doraemon 2
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Comedy, Science Fiction, Drama, Family, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Nobita travels to the future to show his beloved grandma his bride, but adult Nobita has fled his own wedding.

recommendations.title: The Muppet Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: A retelling of the classic Dickens tale of Ebenezer Scrooge, miser extraordinaire. He is held accountable for his dastardly ways during night-time visitations by the Ghosts of Christmas Past, Present and Future.
